get.description: Lists all apps in the Cloudflare account

post.description: Creates a new Cloudflare calls app. An app is an unique enviroment where each Session can access all Tracks within the app.

delete.description: Deletes an app from Cloudflare Calls

schema.description: A Cloudflare-generated unique identifier for a item.

get.description: Fetches details for a single Calls app.

schema.description: A Cloudflare-generated unique identifier for a item.

put.description: Edit details for a single app.

schema.description: A Cloudflare-generated unique identifier for a item.

get.description: Lists all TURN keys in the Cloudflare account

post.description: Creates a new Cloudflare Calls TURN key.

delete.description: Deletes a TURN key from Cloudflare Calls

schema.description: A Cloudflare-generated unique identifier for a item.

get.description: Fetches details for a single TURN key.

schema.description: A Cloudflare-generated unique identifier for a item.

put.description: Edit details for a single TURN key.

schema.description: A Cloudflare-generated unique identifier for a item.

4XX.description: Edit TURN key details response failure

get.description: Lists the live inputs created for an account. To get the credentials needed to stream to a specific live input, request a single live input.

schema.description: Includes the total number of videos associated with the submitted query parameters.

post.description: Creates a live input, and returns credentials that you or your users can use to stream live video to Cloudflare Stream.

4XX.description: Create a live input response failure.

delete.description: Prevents a live input from being streamed to and makes the live input inaccessible to any future API calls.

schema.description: A unique identifier for a live input.

4XX.description: Delete a live input response failure.

get.description: Retrieves details of an existing live input.

schema.description: A unique identifier for a live input.

4XX.description: Retrieve a live input response failure.

schema.description: A unique identifier for a live input.

4XX.description: Update a live input response failure.

post.description: Prevents a live input from being streamed to and makes the live input inaccessible to any future API calls until enabled.

schema.description: A unique identifier for a live input.

4XX.description: Disable a live input response failure.

post.description: Allows a live input to be streamed to and makes the live input accessible to any future API calls.

schema.description: A unique identifier for a live input.

4XX.description: Enable a live input response failure.

get.description: Retrieves all outputs associated with a specified live input.

schema.description: A unique identifier for a live input.

200.description: List all outputs associated with a specified live input response.

4XX.description: List all outputs associated with a specified live input response failure.

get.summary: List all outputs associated with a specified live input

post.description: Creates a new output that can be used to simulcast or restream live video to other RTMP or SRT destinations. Outputs are always linked to a specific live input — one live input can have many outputs.

schema.description: A unique identifier for a live input.

200.description: Create a new output, connected to a live input response.

4XX.description: Create a new output, connected to a live input response failure.

post.summary: Create a new output, connected to a live input

delete.description: Deletes an output and removes it from the associated live input.

schema.description: A unique identifier for the output.
A unique identifier for a live input.

put.description: Updates the state of an output.

schema.description: A unique identifier for the output.
A unique identifier for a live input.

range.description: The total number of remaining live inputs based on cursor position.

total.description: The total number of live inputs that match the provided filters.

name.description: A short description of Calls app, not shown to end users.

created.description: The date and time the live input was created.

deleteRecordingAfterDays.description: Indicates the number of days after which the live inputs recordings will be deleted. When a stream completes and the recording is ready, the value is used to calculate a scheduled deletion date for that recording. Omit the field to indicate no change, or include with a `null` value to remove an existing scheduled deletion.

enabled.description: Indicates whether the live input is enabled and can accept streams.

modified.description: The date and time the live input was last modified.

uid.description: A unique identifier for a live input.

stream_live_input_metadata.description: A user modifiable key-value store used to reference other systems of record for managing live inputs.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.
Whether the API call was successful.

enabled.description: When enabled, live video streamed to the associated live input will be sent to the output URL. When disabled, live video will not be sent to the output URL, even when streaming to the associated live input. Use this to control precisely when you start and stop simulcasting to specific destinations like YouTube and Twitch.

streamKey.description: The streamKey used to authenticate against an output's target.

url.description: The URL an output uses to restream.

stream_live_input_recording_settings.description: Records the input to a Cloudflare Stream video. Behavior depends on the mode. In most cases, the video will initially be viewable as a live video and transition to on-demand after a condition is satisfied.

hideLiveViewerCount.description: Disables reporting the number of live viewers when this property is set to `true`.

mode.description: Specifies the recording behavior for the live input. Set this value to `off` to prevent a recording. Set the value to `automatic` to begin a recording and transition to on-demand after Stream Live stops receiving input.

requireSignedURLs.description: Indicates if a video using the live input has the `requireSignedURLs` property set. Also enforces access controls on any video recording of the livestream with the live input.

timeoutSeconds.description: Determines the amount of time a live input configured in `automatic` mode should wait before a recording transitions from live to on-demand. `0` is recommended for most use cases and indicates the platform default should be used.

created.description: The date and time the live input was created.

deleteRecordingAfterDays.description: Indicates the number of days after which the live inputs recordings will be deleted. When a stream completes and the recording is ready, the value is used to calculate a scheduled deletion date for that recording. Omit the field to indicate no change, or include with a `null` value to remove an existing scheduled deletion.

enabled.description: Indicates whether the live input is enabled and can accept streams.

modified.description: The date and time the live input was last modified.

status.description: The connection status of a live input.

uid.description: A unique identifier for a live input.

stream_input_rtmps.description: Details for streaming to an live input using RTMPS.

streamKey.description: The secret key to use when streaming via RTMPS to a live input.

url.description: The RTMPS URL you provide to the broadcaster, which they stream live video to.

stream_playback_webrtc.description: Details for playback from a live input using WebRTC.

url.description: The URL used to play live video over WebRTC.

stream_playback_srt.description: Details for playback from an live input using SRT.

passphrase.description: The secret key to use for playback via SRT.

streamId.description: The identifier of the live input to use for playback via SRT.

url.description: The URL used to play live video over SRT.

stream_input_webrtc.description: Details for streaming to a live input using WebRTC.

url.description: The WebRTC URL you provide to the broadcaster, which they stream live video to.

stream_input_srt.description: Details for streaming to a live input using SRT.

passphrase.description: The secret key to use when streaming via SRT to a live input.

streamId.description: The identifier of the live input to use when streaming via SRT.

url.description: The SRT URL you provide to the broadcaster, which they stream live video to.

stream_live_input_recording_allowedOrigi.description: Lists the origins allowed to display videos created with this input. Enter allowed origin domains in an array and use `*` for wildcard subdomains. An empty array allows videos to be viewed on any origin.

stream_playback_rtmps.description: Details for playback from an live input using RTMPS.

streamKey.description: The secret key to use for playback via RTMPS.

url.description: The URL used to play live video over RTMPS.
